course_description.overview: Vintage cycling event in the Dolomites, part of L'Eroica series, featuring approximately 110 km of spectacular mountain roads with 2,740 m of climbing over a multi-day festival.

key_segments.name: Dolomites climbs
key_segments.description: Challenging ascents through UNESCO World Heritage Dolomite landscapes on vintage bikes.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Demanding mountain event requiring vintage bicycles (pre-1987), with significant elevation gain in one of the world's most scenic settings.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Innsbruck or Venice, then train or drive to San Candido/Innichen in South Tyrol.
logistics.accommodation: Book early in San Candido due to multi-day festival popularity; hotels and guesthouses in the area.
logistics.registration_details: Opens December 1, 2025; limited entries typical for Eroica events.
logistics.bike_logistics: Vintage bikes only (pre-1987 road bikes with cotterless cranks); transport to Italy required, no modern bikes allowed.
logistics.local_considerations: High altitude Dolomites; prepare for variable September weather; Italian/German-speaking region.

final_verdict.one_liner: Vintage cycling paradise in the majestic Dolomites.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Passionate vintage bike enthusiasts seeking epic mountain scenery and authentic Eroica experience.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for those who prioritize heritage, beauty, and challenge over speed.
pro_tips: Train on climbs with vintage gearing.
Register early as it sells out.
Embrace the festival vibe over multiple days.
